---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Joseph Assiga — Technical Deep Dives"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
listing:
  id: latest-posts
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  max-items: 6
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
  image-height: "200px"
---

::: {.site-hero}
# Technical Deep Dives & Product Explorations

[This site hosts long-form, practical analyses of cloud platforms, distributed systems, and developer tooling — focused on architecture, trade-offs, and real-world fit.]{.lead}

::: {.hero-cta}
[Read the blog](blog.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg role="button"}
[About me](about.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-lg role="button"}
:::
:::

## Latest posts

::: {#latest-posts}
:::

<div class="text-center" style="margin: 2rem 0 4rem;">
  [Browse all posts →](blog.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
</div>
